series_metadata.series_description: Information filed by insurance companies to inform the Ohio Department of Insurance if the companies have been fined or penalized by other states. Filings are required by law.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy hard copy. Retain electronic 5 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy hard copy. Retain electronic 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
